# integrationSlackCustomerChannelLink

Integrates a Slack Asks channel with a Customer.

## Signature

- Root: `Mutations`
- Return Type: [`SuccessPayload`](../objects/success_payload-object.md)!

## Arguments

| Name | Type | Default | Deprecated | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `code` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The Slack OAuth code. |
| `customerId` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The customer to link the Slack channel with |
| `redirectUri` | [`String`](../scalars/string-scalar.md)! | `n/a` | No | The Slack OAuth redirect URI. |
